creator: rotkap@gmx.de
text:
my linux-opera does not start.

the installed version is "linux-opera-10.00"

On startup I get this

shm_allow_removed is disable, set OPERA_NUM_XSHM to 0 to disable shared memory.
ERROR: ld.so: object 'libjvm.so' from LD_PRELOAD cannot be preloaded: ignored.
ERROR: ld.so: object 'libawt.so' from LD_PRELOAD cannot be preloaded: ignored.
/usr/local/share/linux-opera/bin/opera: /usr/lib/libpng12.so.0: no version information available (required by /usr/local/share/linux-opera/bi
n/libQtGui.so.4)
/usr/local/share/linux-opera/bin/opera: /lib/obsolete/linuxthreads/libc.so.6: version `GLIBC_2.4' not found (required by /usr/local/share/lin
ux-opera/bin/libQtCore.so.4)


All my ports are up to date, all linux stuff should be also up to date.

Any Idea, how to fix this?

How-To-Repeat: start linux-opera
